decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; not derived from any existing repository, so it post-dates all model training cutoffs.

blocking: rotate returns xs rotated RIGHT by n, correct for: n larger than len(xs) (equivalent to n mod len), negative n (rotate left), n a multiple of the length or 0 (same order), and an empty list (returns []). For example rotate([1,2,3,4], 1) -> [4,1,2,3] and rotate([1,2,3], 4) -> [3,1,2].
The change modifies only the module and adds no dependency.

weighted.criterion: It reduces n modulo the length (so n > len works) and rotates in the RIGHT direction, handling the empty list.
